name: vkm-design-illustration-deps
description: Pinned deps for trace-svg.mjs and treat-photo.mjs. jimp MUST stay on the 0.22.x line: jimp v1 (current npm default) renamed/removed the exact API these scripts use (default export, positional constructor, Jimp.MIME_PNG, Jimp.AUTO, getBufferAsync). potrace itself depends on jimp@^0.14.0, so it never touches v1 either. Run `npm install` in this folder before using either script; the rest of the skill needs zero npm deps.
